debugger.description: Debugs errors during development. Use when encountering runtime errors, test failures, type errors, lint errors, or unexpected behavior.

consultant.description: Reviews code for clarity, structure, and consistency. Use before committing changes or when you want a fresh perspective on code quality.

creative.description: Suggests new features or evolutions of existing features. Use when you want fresh ideas for expanding the tool.

feature-architect.description: Plans implementation of new features from a technical perspective, analyzing trade-offs and presenting options.
